text:
Created attachment 246871
some changes for https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/freebsd-src-lsp/

~/.vim/vimrc it should be ~/.vim/.vimrc
I think we could change devel/llvm12 (Other versions are okay, but newer is better. Replace clangd12 with clangdN in case other versions are used.)
into 
devel/llvm15 (Other versions are okay, but newer is better. Replace clangd15 with clangdN in case other versions are used.).
because of the inconsistency with llvm version,maybe can change it to the same version.
